Uses of Interface
me.itzloghotxd.nbt.Tag

Packages that use Tag
Package
Description
me.itzloghotxd.nbt
Provides the core classes and interfaces for the Named Binary Tag (NBT) library.
me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags
Contains concrete implementations of Tag representing all currently supported Named Binary Tag (NBT) types.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    AbstractTag<T>
    An implementation of the Tag interface.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract @NotNull Tag<T>
    AbstractTag.clone()
    Creates a deep copy of this tag.
    @NotNull Tag<T>
    Tag.clone()
    Creates a deep copy of this tag.
    static Tag<?>
    TagType.createByType(TagType type)
    Creates a new, instance of a Tag corresponding to the specified TagType with its corresponding value and empty name.

  • Uses of Tag in me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags

    Classes in me.itzloghotxd.nbt.tags that implement Tag
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ByteArrayTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding an array of byte values.
    class 
    ByteTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single byte value.
    class 
    DoubleTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single double value.
    class 
    FloatTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single float value.
    class 
    IntegerArrayTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding an array of int values.
    class 
    IntegerTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single int value.
    class 
    LongArrayTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding an array of long values.
    class 
    LongTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single long value.
    class 
    ShortTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a single short value.
    class 
    StringTag
    Represents an NBT tag holding a String value.
